title: Stizolobium mite
taxonomy: Stizolobium mite is a plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae). It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the subfamily Faboideae. This plant is native to South America and is often found in tropical regions. The classification of Stizolobium mite is further categorized into the genus Stizolobium and the family Fabaceae. Stizolobium mite is a member of the order Fabales.
